_comment: Step 4.10 (04-program §5): mutation testing over the intelligence engine — the place a silent bug is most costly after the finance calculators (which get their own scope in Phase 5). OPT-IN via `npm run test:mutation`; never part of the default `npm test` gate. The kill vehicle is the unit tier (the engine suites all live there); the command runner keeps our zero-framework harness. MEASURED BASELINE 2026-07-02: 56.43% overall in 7m36s (3,603 mutants) — the statistical core is healthy (weights 75.5 / scope 75.3 / engine 69.2 / persistence 68.2) and the drag is copy/render surfaces (trends-glance 23.0 render half, signals 34.2 label tables, view copy strings), where killing mutants means brittle string-pinning. `break` is therefore a RATCHET FLOOR (raise it as 4.10b strengthens the core toward the blueprint's 75–80 target; never lower it), not the aspiration.
